rag_rules: Assume and guarantee statements must be placed in component types, not implementations
All referenced identifiers in AGREE contracts must be resolvable within the current scope
generic_rules: Fix root reference errors by resolving undefined identifiers or removing invalid clauses
Only use visible AADL features or helper declarations within the same annex
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Component implementations may only contain assignments, not assume/guarantee
anti_patterns: Adding assume/guarantee statements in component implementations instead of types
Referencing undefined identifiers without resolving them first
irrelevant_topics: Component type vs implementation distinctions beyond AGREE scope
